asset.title: Startup Diligence War Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: The walkthrough effectively demonstrates NodeRoom's multi-agent collaboration and data enrichment capabilities within a realistic startup diligence scenario. The UI is highly functional and consistent with the product's core value proposition.

featureClarity.evidence: Shows clear transition from spreadsheet to research tab and agent execution.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Demonstrates the full flow from pending enrichment to execution and handoff options.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode layout, though the interface is highly dense with multiple panels.

consistency.evidence: Perfect alignment with NodeRoom's multi-agent, spreadsheet, and trace-based architecture.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time trace updates and agent responses.

legibility.evidence: Small font sizes in the trace log and chat sidebar can be hard to read on smaller screens.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly addresses startup diligence workflows, highly relevant to finance and operations.

productionHonesty.evidence: Clearly shows simulated agent steps and realistic execution logs.

observedEvidence: Copilot panel with public and private tabs

defects.observed: The Room Trace log text is extremely dense and wraps tightly, reducing legibility.
defects.fix: Increase line height or add subtle spacing between trace events.

defects.observed: The switch from Public to Private copilot is subtle and easy to miss without the overlay text.
defects.fix: Add a stronger visual indicator or transition effect when switching privacy states.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Collaborate with public and private AI agents to enrich startup data, run diligence checks, and hand off drafts directly from your war room.
